messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0172",
  "title": "娱乐场",
  "page_index": 1,
  "page_range": "1"
}

Section text:
## 娱乐场

Cash TornadoT Slots

Jackpot MasterTM Slots

message.content: This section identifies two slot machine game entities ("Cash TornadoT Slots" and "Jackpot MasterTM Slots") under the "娱乐场" (Casino) topic. It can answer questions regarding which specific slot game titles are listed in this section or what entities are categorized under the casino heading. The section contains no dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types.
